'''Velvalee''' was a [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|Chief Petty Officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. While assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he shared quarters with [[Tenn Graneet]].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}}
